/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/core/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/network/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/network/discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/network/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/chat/chat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/file/file_sender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/file/file_receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/security/encryption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/ui/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o bin/NexusLink  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
